news.t: State Street Investment Management Enhances Access to Leveraged Loans With New ETF

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P Leveraged Loan ETF (LVLN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P USD Select Leveraged Loan index. The fund is passively managed to invest in high-yield senior loans denominated in USD. The fund selects and weights its holdings based on market value. LVLN was launched on Nov 17, 2025 and is issued by State Street.
infoTable: S&P USD Select Leveraged Loan Index

data.title: State Street Investment Management Enhances Access to Leveraged Loans With New ETF
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--State Street Investment Management announced today the launch of the State Street® SPDR® S&P® Leveraged Loan ETF (LVLN). Designed to offer investors broad, index-based exposur...
